binds: later held-out source/target fixture authors; forward-binding sibling artifact (design §8)

screen.note: deterministic machine gate plus the basis for cold semantic attestation; it does not prove semantic disjointness

whole_domain_exclusion: the entire software packaging/ecosystem provenance domain family (security advisories, deprecation/EOL schedules, license scope records) is barred from held-out families

probes.probe-mc-01: Which versions of the npm package flatted does GHSA-25h7-pfq9-p65f say are vulnerable?
probes.probe-mc-02: What end-of-life date does endoflife.date list for tomcat release line 9.0?
probes.probe-mc-03: Below which github.com/moby/spdystream release does GO-2026-4958 report the frame-parsing issue as affected?
probes.probe-mc-04: Which sections of the Apache License 2.0 does the LLVM exception waive for embedded object-form portions?
probes.probe-mc-05: Below which release of hpke-rs-rust-crypto does RUSTSEC-2026-0072 report the shared-secret check as missing?
probes.probe-mm-01: According to RUSTSEC-2026-0185, below which release of the quinn-proto crate are versions affected?
probes.probe-mm-02: What vulnerable version range does GHSA-w7jw-789q-3m8p give for the npm package shell-quote?
probes.probe-mm-03: What end-of-life date does endoflife.date list for visual-studio release line 18.6?
probes.probe-mm-04: Below which golang.org/x/net release does GO-2026-4440 report the html parsing issue as affected?
probes.probe-mm-05: Under the Boost Software License 1.0, when may copies of the Software omit the copyright notices and license statement?
probes.probe-sf-01: According to RUSTSEC-2026-0002, which versions of the Rust crate lru are affected?
probes.probe-sf-02: What end-of-life date does endoflife.date list for spring-boot release line 3.5?
probes.probe-sf-03: Which version ranges of the npm package undici does GHSA-hm92-r4w5-c3mj list as vulnerable?
probes.probe-sf-04: What linking permission does the Classpath exception 2.0 grant beyond the GNU GPL?
probes.probe-sf-05: Which versions of google.golang.org/grpc does GO-2026-4762 report as affected, and through which serving symbol?
